narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township L (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,140 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.1 percentage points.
